name: MyProtein Crispy Protein Wafers 10pk
description_html:
Enjoy a tasty, protein-packed snack with this 10-pack of crispy protein wafers - perfect for on-the-go fuel or a healthier treat between meals. Each wafer delivers about 15g of protein to help support muscle maintenance and daily protein goals, while keeping calories moderate compared with typical sweets. 

Light and crunchy with delicious flavors, these wafers blend whey and milk protein isolates with a crisp wafer texture, offering a more satisfying alternative to traditional snacks. Ideal for fitness enthusiasts or anyone looking for a protein-rich pick-me-up without compromising on flavor.

name: MyProtein Origin Whey Protein 1.5lbs
description_html:
Introducing Origin Protein, the no-frills, high-powered protein supplement designed to maximize your workout and fuel your muscles.

Packed with 30g of protein per serving, Origin Protein delivers exactly what you need, when you need it, without any unnecessary extras.
Each delicious serving includes 25g of fast-absorbing whey protein concentrate to jumpstart muscle recovery and growth right after your workout, and 5g of slow-release casein to help keep your muscles fueled for hours, making it perfect for overnight recovery.

And, there’s 5g of creatine monohydrate to help enhance muscle strength and power, helping you push your limits and achieve your fitness goals.

name: Myprotein Clear Whey Isolate
description_html:
Refreshing, Fruity Protein Drink

Rebuild Lean Muscle. Refresh Recovery. Fuel Performance.

Upgrade your post-workout routine with Myprotein Clear Whey Isolate, the game changing protein drink that delivers all the benefits of whey without the milky texture. Designed for athletes who want a light, refreshing way to recover, each serving packs over 20g of premium whey isolate with minimal sugar, carbs, and fat.

Whether you’re training hard, cutting, or simply looking for a crisp protein option, Clear Whey helps you hydrate, repair, and refuel without the heaviness of traditional shakes.

Why Choose Myprotein Clear Whey Isolate?

  • Light & Refreshing Flavor – A clear, juice like protein drink perfect after any workout.

  • High Protein, Low-Sugar Formula – 20g+ of whey isolate per serving to support lean muscle growth.

  • Fast Absorbing Recovery – Rapid digestion to kick start muscle repair and reduce soreness.

  • Fruity Flavor Options – Enjoy clean, crisp taste without chalky texture or excess calories.

  • Easy Mixing – Instantly dissolves in cold water for smooth, clean refreshment.

Key Ingredients & Benefits

  • Whey Protein Isolate – Ultra-pure, fast absorbing protein source ideal for post-workout recovery.

  • BCAAs & EAAs – Support muscle protein synthesis and reduce breakdown.

  • Low Carb, Low Fat – Perfect for lean goals, cutting phases, or calorie-controlled diets.

  • Electrolyte Support – Keeps you hydrated and performing at your best.

Who Should Take Clear Whey Isolate?

  • Athletes & Gym Enthusiasts – Fast-digesting protein for quick recovery.

  • Weight-Conscious Users – High protein, low sugar for lean results.

  • Busy Professionals – Easy shake-and-go formula for a light, mid-day protein boost.

  • Anyone Tired of Heavy Shakes – Refreshing, fruit based flavor you’ll actually look forward to drinking.

How to Use

Recommended Dosage: Mix 1 scoop with 10–12 oz of cold water.
Best Time: Post-workout or anytime you need a clean protein boost.
Stacking Tips: Combine with creatine (strength), EAAs (recovery), or pre-workout (performance) for complete results.

Why Myprotein?

Myprotein is one of the world’s leading sports nutrition brands, trusted by athletes across 70+ countries. Their mission: to deliver premium, science backed supplements that help you fuel performance and achieve your goals. Clear Whey Isolate proves that recovery can taste just as good as it feels.

Rehydrate. Recover. Refresh. Order Myprotein Clear Whey Isolate today  the light, fruity protein drink that makes every rep worth it.

name: Myprotein Creatine Monohydrate
description_html:
Myprotein Creatine Monohydrate

Strength, Power & Muscle Performance

Train Harder. Lift Heavier. Recover Faster.

Power your workouts with Myprotein Creatine Monohydrate a scientifically proven supplement designed to increase strength, muscle power, and performance in short bursts of high-intensity exercise. Each serving delivers pure, unflavored creatine monohydrate, one of the most studied and effective ingredients for athletes and lifters.

Whether you’re training in the gym, sprinting on the field, or pushing your limits in competition, Myprotein Creatine Monohydrate helps you build lean muscle, boost endurance, and enhance recovery without fillers or unnecessary additives.

Why Choose Myprotein Creatine Monohydrate?

  • Increase Strength & Power – Supports ATP production for stronger lifts and explosive movements.

  • Proven Performance – Backed by decades of research for muscle growth and endurance.

  • Pure, Unflavored Formula – Mixes easily with protein shakes, pre-workouts, or juice.

  • Muscle Recovery Support – Helps replenish energy stores and reduce fatigue post-training.

  • Flexible Dosing – Easy to measure and stack with other performance supplements.

Key Ingredients & Benefits

  • Creatine Monohydrate (5g per serving) – Enhances ATP regeneration, boosts muscular strength, and supports lean muscle growth.

  • Micronized Powder Form – Improves absorption and mixing for smooth consistency.

  • Zero Sugar or Fillers – Delivers pure, clean performance support.

Who Should Take Creatine Monohydrate?

  • Strength Athletes & Bodybuilders – Increase power output and build lean muscle mass.

  • High Intensity Trainers – Maximize short burst performance for sprints or heavy sets.

  • Endurance Athletes – Improve muscular efficiency and reduce fatigue.

  • Anyone Seeking Recovery Support – Aid post-workout energy replenishment and repair.

How to Use

Recommended Dosage: Mix 1 scoop (5g) with water, juice, or your favorite shake once daily.
Best Time: Post-workout or any time during the day to maintain saturation levels.
Stacking Tips: Combine with protein (muscle repair), EAAs (recovery), or pre-workout (energy) for complete performance support.

Why Myprotein?

Founded in 2004, Myprotein has become one of the world’s leading sports nutrition brands  trusted by athletes worldwide for premium, science backed supplements. Myprotein Creatine Monohydrate delivers consistent results, exceptional quality, and clean power you can trust.

Lift Stronger. Perform Better. Recover Faster. Order Myprotein Creatine Monohydrate today the ultimate foundation for strength, endurance, and performance!

name: Myprotein Crispy Layered Protein Bars 12 Pack
description_html:
Myprotein Crispy Layered Protein Bars 12 Pack 

 High Protein Snack for Energy & Recovery

Crave Worthy Flavor. Serious Nutrition. Anytime Energy.

Satisfy your sweet tooth without sacrificing results with Myprotein Crispy Layered Bars a delicious, high protein snack designed to fuel muscle recovery and crush hunger on the go. Each bar delivers around 20g of protein with multiple crunchy, creamy layers for an indulgent texture that supports your goals while tasting like a treat.

Whether you need a post-workout recovery snack, mid-day energy boost, or a clean dessert swap, these bars combine premium protein and low sugar in every bite.

Why Choose Myprotein Crispy Layered Bars?

  • Delicious Multi-Layer Crunch – Crisp, creamy, and coated in flavor without excess sugar.

  • High Protein per Bar – About 20g protein supports muscle repair and daily nutrition goals.

  • Fuel Anytime, Anywhere – Ideal for post-workout recovery, travel, or a quick on-the-go meal.

  • Low Sugar, Guilt-Free – Keeps cravings in check while staying macro-friendly.

  • Satisfying Texture – Layers of crunch and smoothness for a balanced, indulgent bite.

Key Ingredients & Benefits

  • Whey Protein Isolate & Milk Protein – Deliver complete amino acids for muscle growth and repair.

  • Crispy & Cream Layers – Create texture and flavor satisfaction while keeping calories under control.

  • Low Sugar Formulation – Sweetened for taste without unnecessary carbs or spikes.

  • Functional Energy Support – Perfect blend of protein, carbs, and fats for sustained energy.

Who Should Eat Crispy Layered Bars?

  • Active Individuals & Athletes – Perfect for post-training recovery or a protein rich snack.

  • Busy Professionals – Quick, convenient protein option to stay fueled between meals.

  • Dieters & Clean Eaters – High protein, low sugar snack that fits most nutrition plans.

  • Anyone Craving a Healthier Treat – Indulgent flavor meets functional nutrition.

How to Use

When: Enjoy anytime you need a protein boost, post-workout, mid-day, or pre-training.
How: Eat one bar as a snack or meal replacement alternative.
Stacking Tips: Pair with Myprotein Clear Whey Isolate (recovery) or Myprotein Creatine Monohydrate (strength) for complete support.

Why Myprotein?

As one of the world’s leading fitness nutrition brands, Myprotein combines science backed ingredients with incredible taste and texture. Each Crispy Layered Bar proves healthy can be delicious supporting your goals with quality, flavor, and performance in every bite.

Snack Smart. Fuel Strong. Feel Satisfied. Order Myprotein Crispy Layered Protein Bars 12 Pack today, the high protein snack that delivers indulgence with purpose.
